visual_enhancers.background_effect: A subtle radial gradient blob (e.g. #000000 at 5% opacity for light mode, #FFFFFF at 5% opacity for dark mode) centered at the top of the page to add depth.

layouts.main_container: max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 md:px-8 py-16 md:py-32
layouts.hero_section: flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-8 text-center
layouts.transcript_area: mt-16 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden glassmorphism flex flex-col h-[600px] max-h-[80vh]
layouts.controls_bar: flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-black/5 dark:border-white/10 bg-black/5 dark:bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md

components.UrlInput: Large, heavily rounded (rounded-full) input with inset shadow, sleek glowing border on focus. Include a primary button embedded on the right side. Height: h-14 or h-16. Use text-lg.
components.TranscriptLine: Hover states are critical. When hovering over a transcript line, it should slightly highlight `hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/5` and show the timestamp. Timestamps use `font-mono text-xs text-mutedForeground`.
components.LanguageSelector: Use Shadcn Select with customized glass dropdown.
components.ActionButtons: Minimalist buttons with Lucide icons (Download TXT, SRT, Copy).

motion.page_load: framer-motion for staggered fade-in up of the hero, input, and then transcript container.
motion.transcript_fetch: Skeleton loader with a subtle pulse/shimmer effect matching the glassmorphism theme.
motion.hover_states: All buttons and interactive elements must have `transition-transform duration-300 ease-out`, avoiding transition-all.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use APCA standards.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a distinct focus ring (`focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Manrope for headings and Geist for body text.
Setup Tailwind config to use CSS variables for colors to easily toggle dark/light mode via `next-themes` or native React context.
Implement the 'Crystal/Apple Variant' for the main transcript container (backdrop-blur-2xl, subtle border, bg-white/70 or bg-black/40).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., `data-testid="url-input"`, `data-testid="fetch-button"`).
Use Lucide React (already installed) for sleek, thin-line icons matching the Linear/Apple aesthetic.
DO NOT use raw HTML `<select>`. Use Shadcn UI components.
Apply `transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease` for interactive elements rather than `transition: all`.
Do not center-align the app container (`.App`). Keep text left-aligned for readable transcripts.
Provide a system adaptive theme (check `window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')` or use next-themes if available, else standard Tailwind dark class strategy).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`).
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts reading flow.
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or rounded-xl) with interaction animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Add subtle grain textures or noise overlays for depth.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
